moduleTitle: Storage and Shipment of Exposure Devices and Sources

lessons.title: Vehicle Storage and Permanent Storage Vaults
objectives: Describe requirements for vehicle storage of exposure devices and sources
Describe requirements for permanent storage vaults including security and posting
cp105Topics: 11.0 Storage and shipment of exposure devices and sources

lessons.title: Shipping Instructions for Sources
objectives: Describe packaging, labeling, and documentation requirements for shipping radioactive sources
Identify the shipping papers and placarding required for transport

lessons.title: Receiving Radioactive Material
objectives: Describe receiving instructions for radioactive material shipments
Perform receipt surveys and inspections and document the results
